Label: Payer denied Reprocessing — Appeal required
Payer says info not received on Form Mea: The payer says they never received NDC details — even though you submitted them. Check these. CMS Box#23 & UB FL-43-44
Payer says info not received on Form Lin: On a paper claim (CMS-1500) — NDC must be in Box 24, shaded area.
On an electronic claim — NDC goes in the LIN/CTP segment.
Unit of measure must be included — UN, ML, or GR.
If all fields look correct — call the payer and ask exactly which field they require for NDC. Some payers have custom rules.
Resubmit with the correction and confirm the payer received it.
Summary: Always save your notes in the billing system — date, action taken, who you spoke to, and your next follow-up date. This protects you if the claim is disputed later.

Label: Payer denied Reprocessing — Appeal required
Payer says info not received on Form Mea: The payer says they never received NDC or UOB details — even though you submitted them. Check these. CMS Box#23 & UB FL-43-44
Payer says info not received on Form Lin: On a paper claim (CMS-1500) — UOM & NDC must be in Box 24, shaded area.
On an electronic claim — NDC & UOM goes in the LIN/CTP segment.
Unit of measure must be included — UN, ML, or GR.
If all fields look correct — call the payer and ask exactly which field they require for NDC & UOM. Some payers have custom rules.
Resubmit with the correction and confirm the payer received it.
Summary: Always save your notes in the billing system — date, action taken, who you spoke to, and your next follow-up date. This protects you if the claim is disputed later.
